raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table surface; a gentle lateral brace will not shift the stacked boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally stabilized against sliding while box_1 is manipulated."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have clear access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the stabilizing contact on box_2 prevents the stack from shifting; enough vertical clearance exists to lift box_1 without scraping box_2 (noting box_2 is attached_to box_1, so both may need to lift together).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held in a two-handed lateral pinch (and, due to attachment, box_2 may be co-lifted as a coupled assembly)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table surface; a gentle lateral brace will not shift the stacked boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally stabilized against sliding while box_1 is manipulated.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have clear access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the stabilizing contact on box_2 prevents the stack from shifting; enough vertical clearance exists to lift box_1 without scraping box_2 (noting box_2 is attached_to box_1, so both may need to lift together).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held in a two-handed lateral pinch (and, due to attachment, box_2 may be co-lifted as a coupled assembly).
